title: ligusticum oreganum
intro: Ligusticum oreganum, also known as Lovage, is a perennial plant in the carrot family native to Europe and Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its expectorant, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Ligusticum oreganum include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and aid in digestion. Herbal preparations of Lovage include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used fresh or dried, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
